allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Unify codebase to single Vite system with inventory_* tables

## Changes:
- Unified Supabase client to lib/supabaseClient.ts \(VITE_* env\)
- Removed duplicate lib/supabase.ts \(NEXT_PUBLIC_* env\)
- Removed lib/api/inventory.ts and lib/api/pos.ts \(used wrong tables\)
- Updated lib/pos.ts with fallback for stock deduction
- Updated lib/inventory.ts with fallback for stock movement
- Removed mock data fallbacks in lib/inventory.ts and lib/orders.ts
- Removed unused Next.js directories: app/, apps/, packages/
- Removed unused layout components using Next.js imports
- Updated all lib/api/*.ts imports to use supabaseClient

## Database tables now unified:
- inventory_products, inventory_stock, inventory_categories
- inventory_warehouses, inventory_stock_movements
- pos_orders, pos_order_items, pos_payments, pos_shifts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove Next.js config and fix env examples

- Delete next.config.mjs \(not used with Vite\)
- Delete .env.supabase.local.example \(contained exposed secrets\)
- Update .env.example to use VITE_* prefix instead of NEXT_PUBLIC_*

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add dropdown-menu sheet input badge separator skeleton scroll-area checkbox select table card tabs avatar tooltip -y)
